pi_items.source: task description and scripts/setup_openproject.sh which creates a project with this identifier.
task description and tasks/create_wiki_embedded_dashboard/export_result.sh which searches for a Wiki Page with this exact title.
task description and tasks/create_wiki_embedded_dashboard/verifier.py which performs a regex search for this header in the page content.
task description and tasks/create_wiki_embedded_dashboard/export_result.sh which uses Rails runner to get the status ID for 'In progress' to verify the macro filter.

privileged_info_summary: The OpenProject environment contains a synthetic project identified as 'devops-automation'. The target task asks to create a new wiki page with title 'Live Incident Board' in this project, insert a header 'Current Active Tasks', and embed a Work Packages Table macro filtering by the status 'In progress'. All these parameters are successfully verified against the setup scripts, the expected outcome in the task description, and the verification code.
